name: eos-monorepo
description: Repo-root for ESLint config and dev tooling. Each sub-package (contracts/, core/, infra/, gateway/, spawner/, manager/, manager/web/) has its own deps.

scripts.lint: eslint contracts/src/ core/src/ infra/src/ manager/cli.ts manager/cli/ manager/daemon.ts manager/container.ts manager/routes/ manager/middleware/ manager/sse/ manager/orchestrator-mcp.ts manager/orchestrator-mcp/ manager/shared/ spawner/ gateway/ manager/web/src/
